homePage.title: Your AIPA Travel Companion
homePage.welcome: Welcome to AIPA - Your AIPA Travel Companion
homePage.description: Discover personalized travel itineraries, explore top destinations, and plan your perfect trip with AIPA. Start your adventure today!
homePage.middleBannerDescription: At AIPA, we believe strong relationships enhance our ability to serve you better. We are proud members of the Sri Lanka Association of Inbound Tour Operators (SLAITO) and hold accreditations from recognized travel industry authorities, ensuring that every journey you take with us is reliable, professional, and unforgettable.
homePage.adventuresDescription: Experience the thrill of Sri Lanka's most amazing adventures, from wildlife safaris to water sports and everything in between. Let AIPA guide you to unforgettable experiences that will create lasting memories.

nineArch.title: Into the Hills
nineArch.subtitle: Scenic train journeys
nineArch.description: Experience the iconic Nine Arch Bridge surrounded by lush greenery.

galle.title: Colonial Charm
galle.subtitle: Walk through history
galle.description: Discover the timeless beauty of Galle Fort and coastal heritage.

sigiriya.title: Ancient Wonders
sigiriya.subtitle: Climb the Lion Rock
sigiriya.description: Explore the majestic Sigiriya fortress and its ancient secrets.

bentota.title: Luxury Redefined
bentota.subtitle: Where nature meets elegance
bentota.description: Relax on golden beaches and experience the serenity of Bentota.

tea.title: Tea Country
tea.subtitle: Fresh from the hills
tea.description: Walk through Sri Lanka’s lush tea plantations and cool climates.

aboutUs.title: About AIPA
aboutUs.shortDescription:
AIPA is a premier travel agency in Sri Lanka, dedicated to providing exceptional travel experiences. Our purpose is to showcase the hidden gems of Sri Lanka, connecting travelers with the authentic beauty, culture, and unique experiences this island has to offer.

We are committed to delivering valuable services to our customers by combining our expertise, personalized guidance, and passion for travel. At AIPA, every journey is crafted to be memorable, seamless, and truly special.
aboutUs.leftService: Quote and update trips in minutes
aboutUs.rightService: Create journeys that your clients will never forget

itineraries.title: Itineraries
itineraries.subtitle: Handcrafted adventures that reveal the heart and soul of Sri Lanka

culturalTriangleItinerary.title: Cultural Triangle Itinerary
culturalTriangleItinerary.overview: Discover the rich history and culture of Sri Lanka's Cultural Triangle with this 7-day itinerary. Explore ancient cities, majestic rock fortresses, sacred temples, and traditional village life, all while enjoying luxury accommodations and personalized guided tours.

days.day1_desc: Welcome to Sri Lanka! Transfer to your luxury hotel in the Cultural Triangle area.
days.day2_desc: Visit the Temple of the Tooth.
days.day3_desc: Private dawn climb followed by Dambulla visit.
days.day7_desc: Morning visit to Mihintale and departure.

teaHighlandItinerary.title: Tea Country & Highland Retreat
teaHighlandItinerary.overview: Immerse yourself in the misty mountains of Nuwara Eliya and experience the finest Ceylon tea plantations.

days.day1_desc: Transfer to Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka.
days.day2_desc: Scenic drive to Nuwara Eliya through tea plantations.
days.day3_desc: Visit a tea factory and explore Horton Plains.
days.day4_desc: Visit the Nine Arches Bridge and Ella rock views.
days.day5_desc: Transfer to airport or continue your journey.

wildlifeSafariItinerary.title: Wildlife Safari Adventure
wildlifeSafariItinerary.overview: Track leopards in Yala, witness elephants in Udawalawe, and experience the finest wildlife adventures.

days.day1_desc: Transfer to Yala and settle into your luxury safari lodge.
days.day2_desc: Dawn safari in Yala National Park.
days.day4_desc: Transfer to Udawalawe and afternoon elephant safari.
days.day5_desc: Visit the Elephant Orphanage and more wildlife.
days.day6_desc: Transfer to airport with memories of wildlife.

coastalParadiseItinerary.title: Coastal Paradise Journey
coastalParadiseItinerary.overview: From whale watching in Mirissa to the historic Galle Fort, experience the best of Sri Lanka's southern coast.

days.day3_desc: Relax at the beach or try water sports.
days.day4_desc: Full day exploration of Galle Fort.

grandIslandItinerary.title: The Grand Island Circuit
grandIslandItinerary.overview: The ultimate Sri Lankan adventure covering all major highlights from north to south, east to west.

days.day5_desc: Temple of the Tooth and city.

wellnessRetreatItinerary.title: Wellness & Spiritual Retreat
wellnessRetreatItinerary.overview: Rejuvenate your soul with Ayurvedic treatments, meditation sessions, and visits to sacred Buddhist temples.

days.day2_desc: Visit to sacred temples and meditation.
days.day3_desc: Full day of treatments and yoga.

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Handpicked places showcasing the beauty and diversity of Sri Lanka

mirissaDestination.title: Mirissa Beach Escape
mirissaDestination.overview: Relax on golden sandy beaches and enjoy unforgettable whale watching experiences in the south coast of Sri Lanka.

bentotaDestination.title: Bentota Coastal Escape
bentotaDestination.overview: Experience thrilling water sports and peaceful river safaris in one of Sri Lanka’s most famous beach destinations.

sigiriyaDestination.title: Sigiriya Heritage
sigiriyaDestination.overview: Discover the ancient wonders of Sri Lanka with visits to iconic UNESCO heritage sites and historic ruins.

kandyDestination.title: Kandy Cultural Experience
kandyDestination.overview: Immerse yourself in Sri Lanka’s rich traditions with temple visits and cultural performances.

ellaDestination.title: Ella Adventure
ellaDestination.overview: Explore scenic mountain landscapes, tea plantations, and iconic landmarks in Ella.

nuwaraEliyaDestination.title: Nuwara Eliya Retreat
nuwaraEliyaDestination.overview: Enjoy cool climate, colonial charm, and breathtaking tea plantations in Sri Lanka’s hill country.

yalaDestination.title: Yala Safari Adventure
yalaDestination.overview: Experience thrilling wildlife safaris and spot leopards in Sri Lanka’s most famous national park.

udawalaweDestination.title: Udawalawe Safari
udawalaweDestination.overview: Witness large herds of elephants and visit the famous elephant transit home.

best_price.title: Best Price
best_price.desc: We guarantee competitive pricing with no hidden costs, ensuring you always get the best value for your journey.

hand_picked.title: Hand Picked Destinations
hand_picked.desc: Our travel experts carefully select destinations to provide you with unique, memorable, and high-quality experiences.

customer_care.title: 24 Hours Customer Care
customer_care.desc: Our support team is available around the clock to assist you before, during, and after your trip.

footer.description: Providing inspiration abroad. Discover programs, travel and unforgettable experiences worldwide.

customJourney.heading: Can't Find What You're Looking For?
customJourney.description: Our travel experts can craft a fully personalized itinerary just for you.
